seo.title: Disinfectant & Cleaning Chemicals Manufacturer | Xinix Ethiopia
seo.description: Biodegradable water, hygiene, post-harvest and industrial cleaning chemicals, made in Ethiopia on solar power. We supply across Africa.

home.headline: Disinfection and cleaning chemicals, made in Ethiopia
home.body: Xinix makes biodegradable disinfection and cleaning chemicals at its own solar powered plant in Ethiopia. We supply hospitals, schools, farms, packhouses, factories and water authorities across the country, and we ship to partners across East Africa and the wider continent.
pillars: Works on a zero liquid discharge basis, with no wastewater leaving the plant
Registered and made to recognised quality and safety standards

seo.title: Drinking Water Disinfectant & Treatment | Xinix Ethiopia
seo.description: Biodegradable drinking water disinfectant and tank treatment from Xinix, made in Ethiopia. For homes, schools, clinics and water points across Africa.

water-and-household.headline: Safe water starts with reliable disinfection
water-and-household.body: Many homes, schools and clinics across the region rely on stored or borehole water, and that water needs treating before it is safe to drink. Xinix water products do that simply and affordably. They are biodegradable, made in Ethiopia, and priced to stay within reach. The range covers Drink+ for treating water at the point of use, and AquaDis Tank for cleaning and treating storage tanks and lines.

seo.title: Surface & Hand Disinfectant Manufacturer | Xinix Ethiopia
seo.description: Hospital grade surface, hand and medical disinfectants from Xinix. Biodegradable, alcohol free, made in Ethiopia for clinics, schools and business across Africa.

hygiene-and-institutional.headline: Hygiene that holds up in busy places
hygiene-and-institutional.body: Hospitals, schools, food businesses and transport hubs go through disinfectant in volume, and they need a supply that is dependable and gentle enough for daily use. Xinix makes a hand disinfectant, a surface disinfectant and a clinical grade product, all biodegradable and all available in practical sizes. HandDis covers hand hygiene, SurfDis cleans surfaces and equipment at a one to ten dilution, and MedDis is built for clinical settings.

seo.title: Post-Harvest Treatment & Produce Wash | Xinix Ethiopia
seo.description: Post-harvest disinfection and produce wash that cut spoilage and extend shelf life. From Xinix in Ethiopia, for farms, packhouses and exporters across Africa.

food-and-agriculture.headline: Less spoilage between the field and the market
food-and-agriculture.body: A large share of fruit and vegetables is lost after harvest, to fungus and microbes that take hold in storage and transit. Xinix produce products cut those losses, so growers, packhouses and exporters keep more of what they grow. VegDis washes and sanitises produce, Postharvest+ extends shelf life through the cold chain, and FungDis holds back fungal spoilage. All are biodegradable and come with clear dosing and rinse guidance.

seo.title: Industrial Cleaning Chemicals & Degreaser | Xinix Ethiopia
seo.description: Industrial degreaser, acid cleaner, system flush and biofilm removal from Xinix. Biodegradable cleaning chemicals made in Ethiopia for plants across Africa.

industrial-and-biofilm.headline: Clean plant, fewer stoppages
industrial-and-biofilm.body: Pipes, tanks and machinery foul up over time, and dirty systems cost output and money. Xinix industrial products keep them running. Degrease+ cuts oil and grease, AcidX clears scale and mineral buildup, SystemFlush+ cleans lines and tanks between cycles, and BiofilmDis breaks down the biofilm that ordinary cleaning leaves behind. The range is supplied in practical sizes, with the main cleaners in twenty litre containers.

seo.description: Drink+ treats drinking water at the point of use, for homes, fieldwork and travel where supply is not reliable. Biodegradable, made in Ethiopia.

details.tagline: Clean drinking water wherever the supply is not.

details.feature: Treats water at the point of use.

details.tagline: Keep stored water safe, from tank to tap.

details.feature: Cleans and treats storage tanks and lines.

seo.title: BiofilmDis | Biofilm Removal | Xinix
seo.description: BiofilmDis breaks down and removes biofilm in pipes, tanks and water systems. Biodegradable, made in Ethiopia by Xinix, for plants and water operators.

details.tagline: Break down biofilm where it hides.

seo.title: Solar Powered, Zero Discharge Chemical Manufacturing | Xinix
seo.description: Xinix makes chemicals on solar power, with zero liquid discharge and biodegradable formulas. Locally sourced manufacturing in Ethiopia.

sustainability.headline: Solar power, zero discharge, biodegradable
sustainability.body:
The way Xinix makes its products is part of what it sells. The plant runs on off grid solar power, so production does not depend on the grid and carries no electricity bill. It works on a zero liquid discharge basis, which means no wastewater leaves the site. Reject water is reused, and the rest becomes part of the product itself.

The formulas are biodegradable, breaking down to harmless byproducts after use. Most raw materials are bought inside Ethiopia, which keeps money in the country and supply close to hand, and create local jobs. This is the story for buyers who care where their chemicals come from, and the proof for funders and partners weighing the company up.

seo.title: Quality, Safety and Compliance | Xinix
seo.description: Xinix products are made to consistent quality and safety standards, with a datasheet and safety data sheet for every product to download.

quality.headline: Quality you can check for yourself
quality.body: Buyers should not have to take quality on faith. Xinix products are registered and made to recognised quality and safety standards under licence [insert licence number once issued], and every product carries a datasheet and a safety data sheet that anyone can download. Each batch is made to the same formulation and checked before it leaves the plant.

seo.title: About Xinix | Chemical Manufacturer in Ethiopia
seo.description: Xinix Chemicals Manufacturing PLC makes biodegradable disinfection and cleaning chemicals in Ethiopia, cutting import dependence and creating local jobs.

about.headline: A local answer to imported chemicals
about.body:
More than half of the chemicals Ethiopia uses are imported, which leaves buyers waiting on foreign exchange, customs and shipping, and paying whatever the exchange rate decides. Xinix was built to change that for the products it makes.

From its plant in Ethiopia, Xinix manufactures biodegradable disinfection and cleaning chemicals for water, hygiene, agriculture and industry. The materials are sourced locally, the power comes from the sun, and the products are priced to compete with imports rather than chase them. The company supplies buyers across the country and creates local jobs, with exports to East Africa and markets across the continent.

seo.title: Distributor and Export Partnerships | Xinix, Ethiopia
seo.description: Become a Xinix distributor. Biodegradable disinfection and cleaning chemicals from Ethiopia, for East Africa and markets across the continent.

distributors.headline: Export partnerships across Africa
distributors.body: Xinix is set up to export. We pack for transit and have the capacity to grow with our partners. Distributors beyond Ethiopia are already supplied, and we are opening conversations across East Africa and the rest of the continent. We look for partners with reach into the segments we serve, the means to store and distribute properly, and a commitment to the market rather than a one off order.

seo.title: Contact Xinix | Quotes and Enquiries
seo.description: Contact Xinix for quotes, datasheets and distributor enquiries. Email info@xinix.et or call +251 9 04 55 33 55. Office in Addis Ababa, plant in Ethiopia.

contact.headline: Tell us what you need
contact.body: Send the product and the quantity and we will come back with a price, usually within one working day. For datasheets, ask here or download them from the product pages.
contact.office: Yeka Sub-city, Woreda 08, House No. 195, Office No. 905A, Addis Ababa, Ethiopia.
